paragraphs: The stock price of Fermi Inc. is currently 5.82, representing a 1.85% decrease from the prior close and a 32.79% decrease over the last 21 sessions.

There have been 3 new news headlines in the last 24 hours, with sources including simplywall.st and Yahoo Finance, discussing the company's recent convertible notes offering and the resignation of director designee Miles Everson due to governance concerns.

Recent SEC filings include an 8-K form disclosing the issuance of $431.25 million in aggregate principal amount of 5.00% convertible senior notes due 2031 and the resignation of director Miles Everson, as well as a Form 8-K filing regarding the commencement of an offering for the sale of convertible senior notes. There has been 1 Form 4 filing in the feed.
